data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for photo/video uploads for testimonials, which is explicitly listed in the needs of the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this feature. The absence of any concrete API reads or persisted state checks related to photo/video uploads indicates a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of photo/video upload functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
